normalization.notes: Store Modern Greek monotonic text in NFC while preserving source forms. Decompose only in analysis tooling when tonos or dialytika need to be inspected as combining marks.

segmentation.pedagogical_units: base letters, final sigma, tonos-marked vowel forms, and high-frequency digraphs
segmentation.notes: Modern Greek uses whitespace word boundaries. Treat final sigma as a positional spelling rule and treat common digraphs as pedagogical units after the base alphabet is underway.

sources.notes: Greek and Coptic block metadata for code points, combining marks, and final sigma. Use as infrastructure metadata only.

sources.license: Unicode License reviewed for metadata use
sources.notes: Locale exemplar characters and casing behavior for Modern Greek. Confirm exact CLDR release before ingestion.

sources.license: MIT package license; upstream corpus licenses require review
sources.notes: Useful for broad Modern Greek frequency intuition. Do not ship derived example text from upstream corpora.

sources.license: CC BY-SA; attribution and share-alike review required
sources.notes: Useful for glosses, inflection checks, and spelling variants. Keep discovery-only until attribution and share-alike implications are approved.
Useful for street, transit, place-name, and public-signage validation. Do not ship raw OSM extracts without license review.

sources.license: Europarl terms require review before derived use
sources.notes: Large formal corpus that can cross-check spelling and frequency, but register is poorly matched to traveler-first lessons.
Short menu, sign, and label examples authored from reviewed vocabulary rather than copied from third-party corpora.
